name: spec-autopilot
description: Spec-driven autopilot orchestration for delivery pipelines with 8-phase workflow, 3-layer gate system, and crash recovery

ralph-loop.description: Autonomous iteration loop for Phase 5 implementation. Without it, fallback mode is used.

superpowers.description: Code review skills for Phase 6.5 code review. Without it, basic diff review is used.

openspec.description: OpenSpec framework for spec-driven development. Required for Phase 2-3 artifact generation.
